headline: PTC COMPLETES DIVESTITURE OF KEPWARE AND THINGWORX BUSINESSES
summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced it has completed the previously announced sale of the company's Kepware® industrial connectivity and ThingWorx® Internet of Things (IoT) businesses to TPG, a leading global alternative asset management firm.
